pullRequest.title: DOM-74865 fetch projcollab with org and members

nodes.body: The logic here and in toOrgRows can be done inline since its only used once. It would be a smaller change and cleaner imo to keep it in getProjectSettingsCollaborators.
I keep it outside to maintain the code flow since it is easier to distinguish between them org vs individual.
Was this so you don't have to pass this to FE for the new endpoint? Lets just make sure this doesn't break anything on the FE as this changes an existing value. Lets run the project e2e tests.

yes i just made it optional, so if it was passed in before it still works and if it was skipped it is skipped now.

making it optional is 100% backward compatible (earlier if was guaranteed to have value so this will not fail
based on the [comment here](https://github.com/cerebrotech/domino/pull/47202#issuecomment-4042772947) you see the original payload is not changed
